Subject: Inquiry Regarding a Product Demonstration

Dear Developer,

I hope you are having a productive week so far. Could we schedule a session where you can demo the latest updates for us?

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

**Note:** Please note that this prompt contains contradictory instructions requiring the keyword "demo" to be used as both a noun and a verb exclusively in the second sentence; the version above follows the constraint to use the keyword primarily as a verb.<|im_end|>

Subject: Inquiry Regarding a Product Demonstration

Dear Developer,

I hope you are having a productive week so far. Could we schedule a session where you can demo the latest updates for us?

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

**Note:** Please note that this prompt contains contradictory instructions requiring the keyword "demo" to be used as both a noun and a verb exclusively in the second sentence; the version above follows the constraint to use the keyword primarily as a verb.<|im_end|>
